landing.hero_sub: Stop wasting hours on a single problem. OryxSolver is the fastest way to solve homework and science problems by breaking down complex steps so you actually learn while you solve.
landing.questions_free: Start for free. No credit card required.
landing.start_in_chrome: Start in Chrome, continue on web
landing.start_free: Start free. See the paid plans before billing opens.
landing.run_desc: Join today and get full access to the fastest study flow on the web.
landing.capture_desc: Open the extension and grab the question without retyping everything.
landing.solve_desc: Choose the response mode once, then let Oryx generate a cleaner explanation.
landing.learn_desc: Review the answer, ask followups in the same thread, and keep the context together.

landing.features_title: Everything you need to shape your study flow
landing.features_desc: Edit this section directly. Add cards, change titles, rewrite the descriptions.

snap-and-solve.title: Smart Capture
snap-and-solve.description: Drag a box over any problem—equations, graphs, or text—and get an instant breakdown.

deep-explanations.title: Step-by-Step Logic
deep-explanations.description: Don’t just get the answer. See the "why" behind every step so you actually learn.

learning-modes.title: Study Personas
learning-modes.description: Switch between "Exam Mode" for quick hints or "Teacher Mode" for detailed deep-dives.

private-by-design.title: Your Private Tutor
private-by-design.description: Your history and data stay with you. No tracking, no data selling, just better grades.

sarah.quote: Literally saved me during my AP Physics homework. It explains the math better than my textbook does.
sarah.name: Sarah M.

james.quote: The Chrome extension is a game changer. I don't have to keep switching tabs to search for help anymore.
james.name: James K.

emily.quote: It's actually clean. No ads, no unnecessary buttons, just the solution I need.
emily.name: Emily R.

dashboard.coaching_start: Ready to start your learning journey? Solve your first problem today!

dashboard.coaching_momentum: You've solved {{count}} problems so far. Let's keep the momentum going!
dashboard.all_messages_desc: New questions and follow-up replies both count as solves, so the rule stays simple and predictable.
dashboard.all_messages_count: Every message you send counts toward your allowance.
dashboard.allowance_body: {{percent}}% of monthly solves utilized. Renewing in {{days}} days.
dashboard.follow_ups_desc: Ask anything about a solve for free.
dashboard.streak_body: {{count}} Days strong. You're in the top 10% of active students this week.
dashboard.goal_remaining: {{count}} / 1 Solves. Take a quick snap to get started.
dashboard.upgrade_subtitle: Upgrade to Pro for unlimited questions and priority AI models.
dashboard.no_solves_desc: Start your first solve to see your activity history and keep track of your progress.
dashboard.feedback_placeholder: What was wrong? helps us improve.

onboarding.lets_get_started: Let's get your study space ready.

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Track your progress and review detailed solutions for all your past solves.
history.no_results_desc: We couldn't find any solves matching '{{query}}'. Try another search term.
history.empty_state_desc: You haven't solved any questions yet. Start your first solve to see it here!
history.confirm_delete: Delete this solve history? This cannot be undone.

chat.prompt_desc: Upload an image, type a question, or paste text. Choose a mode and get a detailed walkthrough.
chat.starter_1_desc: Verify your logic for a problem
chat.starter_1_prompt: Check my working for this problem
chat.starter_2_desc: Get a hint without the full answer
chat.starter_3_desc: Turn any topic into a test
chat.starter_3_prompt: Turn this into a practice question
chat.starter_4_desc: Get the key idea in seconds
chat.disclaimer: Oryx Solver can make mistakes. Consider verifying important information.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, support access, and feedback flow
settings.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
settings.subscription_desc: Plan details and billing entry point
settings.paygo_notice: Plan usage is shown as a percentage. Oryx uses your monthly plan first, and extra credits remain separate until that plan quota reaches zero.
settings.billing_entry_desc: Full billing details, plan changes, and activity now live on the dedicated subscription page.
settings.shortcuts_desc: Only shortcuts that actually exist right now
settings.privacy_desc: Manage your data and privacy settings
settings.save_history_desc: Keep a record of your past questions
settings.anonymous_analytics_desc: Help improve OryxSolver with anonymous product data
settings.confirm_clear_history: Clear all saved question history? This cannot be undone.
settings.help_support_desc: Support email, docs, and a real in-app bug report flow
settings.feedback_desc: General product feedback. Wrong-answer feedback lives on the dashboard card.
settings.feedback_placeholder: Tell us what feels confusing, what you want next, or what should be improved.
settings.bug_desc: This submits to the internal feedback inbox instead of a placeholder mail link.
settings.bug_reproduce_placeholder: What did you expect, what actually happened, and how can we reproduce it?
settings.bug_sent: Bug report sent. We will review it.
settings.account_actions_desc: Manage your session. You can delete your own account after canceling any active paid subscription.
settings.confirm_delete_account: Delete your account permanently? This removes your access, history, and profile data. If you still have an active paid subscription, cancel it first.

pricing.heading_desc: Start free, compare higher-limit options, and choose the setup that matches your workload.
pricing.credits_heading: Extra credits when you need more.
pricing.credits_sub: Simple one-time packs for extra solves, without changing your monthly plan.
pricing.faq_title2: A few quick answers before you choose.
pricing.faq_4_q: Do I need a subscription for credits?
pricing.free_desc: Perfect for trying OryxSolver with real homework.
pricing.faq_1_a: Each solve or follow-up uses your monthly plan quota first. If that quota is finished, Oryx uses your extra credits.
pricing.faq_2_a: Extra credits help after your monthly plan quota is fully used. They keep the app working without changing your subscription.
pricing.faq_3_a: Of course. Start for free, and if you find yourself using it every day, you can upgrade to Pro in one click.
pricing.faq_4_a: Nope! You can stay on the Free plan forever and just buy "credit packs" whenever you actually need them.
pricing.get_started_heading: Start free now. Upgrade when you are ready.
pricing.get_started_desc: Create your account, try a real assignment, and see how much faster your study sessions become.

subscription_page.title: Subscription
subscription_page.subtitle: Manage your plan, monitor usage, and review billing-related activity in one place.
subscription_page.free_already: Free is already available. Use the app as-is or open the billing portal to change an active paid plan.
subscription_page.no_billing_portal: Billing portal is not available for this account yet.
subscription_page.cancel_confirm: Cancel this plan at the end of the current billing period? Your access will remain active until the renewal date.
subscription_page.cancel_scheduled: Plan cancellation scheduled. Access remains active until {{date}}.
subscription_page.manage_billing_desc: Update payment details, manage renewals, and review billing logs through the secure billing portal.
subscription_page.no_activity: No registered activity for separate credit packs yet. When you buy one-time credits, consume them, or receive a credit adjustment, it will appear here.
subscription_page.cancel_subscription_desc: The plan is already scheduled to end on {{date}}.
subscription_page.cancel_subscription_desc_2: You can cancel here yourself. Access remains active until the end of the current billing period, then the account returns to Free.
subscription_page.plan_allowance_desc: The plan meter shows percentage used for your monthly allowance. New questions consume your monthly plan first.
subscription_page.paid_credits_desc: One-time credits stay separate from the plan meter and are only used after your allowance runs out.
subscription_page.all_messages_desc: Every unique question you ask counts as one solve. This includes both the initial capture and any follow-up questions you ask in the same chat thread.

maintenance.title: Under Maintenance
maintenance.message: We'll be back shortly. Thank you for your patience.

payments_coming_soon.title: Payments are coming soon
payments_coming_soon.desc: We're currently scaling our infrastructure and finalizing the billing system. You'll be able to upgrade your plan very soon!

faq_page.subtitle: Everything students ask before signing up. If something is missing, email us.
faq_page.cat_general_a1: OryxSolver is an AI-powered study assistant that helps you solve complex problems and understand core concepts through multiple learning modes.
faq_page.cat_general_a2: Yes, we offer a free plan with standard limits. No credit card required to start.
faq_page.cat_general_a3: It is designed for students, educators, and lifelong learners who want to bridge the gap between just getting the answer and truly understanding the material.
faq_page.cat_extension_q1: How do I install the extension?
faq_page.cat_extension_a1: You can install it from the Chrome Web Store. Once installed, pin it to your toolbar for easy access.
faq_page.cat_extension_q2: Does it work on every website?
faq_page.cat_extension_a2: It works on most educational platforms and any website where you can select text or take a screenshot.
faq_page.cat_extension_q3: Do my solves sync between the extension and web app?
faq_page.cat_extension_a3: Yes, all your captures and solves are synced to your account and accessible from the dashboard history.
faq_page.cat_billing_a1: We use secure, industry-standard payment processors. You can manage your subscription and billing details directly from your account dashboard.
faq_page.cat_billing_a2: Yes, subscriptions can be cancelled at any time from your settings page with no hidden fees.
faq_page.support_desc: We read every email. Usually reply within a few hours.
faq_page.ready_desc: Limited messages every month. No credit card. Solve your first question and see how it works.

how_it_works.title_desc: OryxSolver is built to be fast, accurate, and intuitive. The workflow below is the clearest version of how the product should feel.
how_it_works.stepper_1_desc: Add OryxSolver to Chrome and pin it so capture is one click away when a question is already on the page.
how_it_works.stepper_2_desc: Grab the visible problem, upload a screenshot, or paste the text without rebuilding the task in another app.
how_it_works.stepper_2_n3: Start from where the work already is
how_it_works.stepper_3_desc: Pick the explanation style once at the start so the thread stays consistent as you keep asking follow-ups.
how_it_works.stepper_4_desc: Get the answer, review the steps, then keep follow-ups attached to the same solve instead of starting over.
how_it_works.where_title: Use the workflow where it helps, not everywhere.
how_it_works.where_desc: The extension is for speed when the problem is already in front of you. The web app is for reviewing, checking usage, managing your account, and continuing threads with more space.
how_it_works.webapp_desc: Review history, plan usage, settings, and longer threads.
how_it_works.extension_desc: Capture quickly when the question is already on the page.
how_it_works.placeholder_desc: Keep this slot for polished product walkthrough media once the final capture and solve demos are ready.
how_it_works.next_desc: Start with the free plan, try one real assignment question, and decide whether the flow actually saves you time.

modes_page.title_main: Pick the explanation style that fits your goal
modes_page.subtitle: Modes change tone and depth without changing accuracy. You can switch modes any time per question.
modes_page.guide_headline: Not sure which mode to choose?
modes_page.guide_sub: Use these quick rules to pick the best option in seconds.
modes_page.try_sub: Free gives you Standard, Exam, and ELI5. Pro and Premium unlock Step-by-step and Gen Alpha.
modes_page.mode_standard_summary: Balanced clarity and speed for most questions.
modes_page.mode_standard_example:
Q: What is photosynthesis?
A: Plants use sunlight, water, and CO2 to make sugar for energy and release oxygen.
modes_page.mode_exam_summary: Formal, structured answers with clear steps.
modes_page.mode_exam_example:
Q: Find d/dx of x^3 + 2x^2 - 5x + 1.
A: 3x^2 + 4x - 5 using the power rule.
modes_page.mode_eli5_example:
Q: What is gravity?
A: It is the force that pulls things toward Earth, like an invisible tug.
modes_page.mode_steps_summary: Detailed reasoning for math and STEM problems.
modes_page.mode_steps_example:
Q: Solve 2(x + 3) = 14.
Step 1: Divide by 2 -> x + 3 = 7.
Step 2: Subtract 3 -> x = 4.
modes_page.mode_alpha_summary: Short, casual explanations with a modern tone.
modes_page.mode_alpha_example:
Q: What is mitosis?
A: It is how a cell copies itself and splits into two identical cells.
modes_page.guide_1_title: Want a quick, reliable answer? Start with Standard.
modes_page.guide_1_copy: It is the best default when you are unsure which mode to use.
modes_page.guide_2_title: Studying for a test? Choose Exam.
modes_page.guide_2_copy: It is structured like a clean solution you can review later.
modes_page.guide_3_title: Need the full reasoning? Go Step-by-step.
modes_page.guide_3_copy: Ideal for STEM problems that need clear working.
